name: Rex -A curse gone wrong-
description:
Rex has always been a big guy so when the opportunity arises for him to find out what it’s like to be skinny he has to take it, even at the expense of his roommate. However, something goes wrong with leaving both Rex and his roommate a bit wide around the middle.

Another suggestion bot, I’m making sure I get to all of them. This time you’re in a secluded magic university in Scotland, which is why there’s a bunch of castles and what not. Anyway, hope you enjoy.

Tags: Fat Fur, Weight Gain, Magic, Obese, Chubby, Magic, Ram, Furry, Magic School, Slob,

-This bot was suggested by @RuneDelta-
creator: corkboarf
